review_notes: The functions provided are relevant to the protection of authenticators within a Kubernetes environment. They map well to the control's intent by focusing on secret management, service account token handling, and API server authentication configuration. However, the inclusion of a function to ensure the use of strong authentication methods on the API server could enhance the coverage.
title: Authenticator Management | Protection of Authenticators
step1_reasoning: The control focuses on the protection of authenticators, which in Kubernetes can be mapped to ensuring that secrets (including tokens and passwords) are encrypted at rest, service account tokens are not automatically mounted unless necessary, and authentication mechanisms are properly configured on the API server. These measures help protect sensitive credentials and authenticators within a Kubernetes environment.
